query:
UPDATE post_processors SET
            name            = COALESCE($2, name),
            controller_type = COALESCE($3, controller_type),
            file_extension  = COALESCE($4, file_extension),
            template_config = COALESCE($5, template_config),
            updated_at      = $6
        WHERE id = $1
        RETURNING
            id,
            name,
            controller_type,
            file_extension,
            template_config,
            created_at,
            updated_at
